    Super Savers

    Super Savers bring you deep weekly discounts on fresh fruit, vegetables and everyday essentials - exclusively with Lidl Plus. Simply scan your Lidl Plus app at the till and enjoy automatic savings on selected items. New Super Saver deals launch every week, helping you stretch your budget further.

    Before we continue: Information on the processing of your data
    We use cookies and similar technologies on our website and process your personal data (e.g. IP address), e.g. to personalize content and ads, integrate media from third-party providers or analyse access to our navcms/navcmsapi/src/main/java/mindshift/navcms/data/ InitialDataService.javawebsite.Data processing may also take place as a result of cookies being set. We share this data with third parties in the privacy settings.

    Data processing may take place with your consent or on the basis of a legitimate interest, which you can object to the privacy settings. You have the right not to consent and to change or withdraw your consent at a later date. You can find more information on the use of your data in our privacy policy.

    Determine the scope of consent

    You can give your consent to the processing individually according to the purposes and functions listed below. If you expand the respective button, you will find detailed information on the techniques and data processing involved. Further information, including your right to withdraw your consent at any time, can be found in our privacy policy.

    Manage Consent Preferences

    Technically necessary

    Always Active

    These are cookies and other technologies without which you cannot use our services (websites/apps) (for example, to correctly display our services, including the language, font and color, to provide the functions requested by you, to take your settings into account, such as your selection regarding cookies and other technologies, to save your login in the login area, to fill the shopping cart when shopping online, etc.).

    Comfort

    With the help of these techniques, we can take into account your actual or presumed preferences for the convenient use of our services. For example, if you leave the online store before completing your order, we may be able to save the goods in your shopping cart. We may also be able to avoid showing you products that are not available in your region.

    Statistics

    These techniques enable us to compile pseudonymous and possibly cross-device statistics on the use of our services for the purpose of their needs-based design. This provides us with information on how or how often our services are used. This enables us to adapt our services even better to the habits of users.

    Marketing

    This enables us and other data controllers to show you and other users suitable advertising content on our services and third-party services (websites/apps/social media) based on the analysis of your pseudonymous usage behavior and to measure the success of the marketing measures. Your usage behavior can also be tracked across different websites, browsers or end devices using a user ID (unique identifier).

    Cookie List
